response.justification: Sarah has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse full-stack experience, but lacks explicit leadership experience in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML architecture design — and her German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments (TypeScript, DLang, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops/showcases
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of leading teams or managing client projects in IT consulting context
Lacks documented experience in UML, requirements management, or formal architecture design frameworks
